title: test_unpin_allows_key_rotation is broken: tests wrong IID
description:
The test claims to verify that unpin() allows key rotation, but it:
1. Unpins identity.iid
2. Then submits announce from other_identity (which has other_identity.iid)
3. The unpin() call has zero effect on the test outcome

The test passes whether or not unpin() is called because other_identity has a completely different IID.

Location: python/tests/announce/test_processor.py lines 562-582

What goes wrong: The test provides false confidence that unpin() serves a purpose for key rotation. It does not actually test any real functionality.
